metadata.label: same/Amazon
metadata.title: Machine Learning Engineer II , AGI Customization
metadata.team_direction: Amazon is seeking a passionate and talented Software Development Engineer for their Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) team to develop customization capabilities for Large Language Models

official_notes: Old report baseline only; official target side was a clean pass.
Old report assessment: official reviewer gave the resume substantial credit for semantic evidence and transferability.
claude_notes: Mostly medium and low suggestions only on the target JD.

findings.issue: 正文里把多个限定性形容词也加粗了，例如 `team-maintained`、`intern-owned`、`team-owned`，会弱化加粗规则本来用来突出技术栈和量化结果的作用。
findings.fix: 取消这些 ownership/限定语的加粗，只保留技术名词、规模数字和真正的结果指标加粗。

findings.issue: 首句是“transitioning from analytics”先行，角色方向虽然明确，但首屏读感仍偏转行叙事，不如直接把 ML/Backend 方向放在最前。
findings.fix: 改成“ML/Backend engineer”或“Machine Learning Engineer”开头，再把从 analytics 迁移的背景放到后半句。

findings.issue: 这一段同时把 Go、Java、C++、Python 讲成主要工作栈，读起来像 4 门语言的日常主责，对实习段来说有堆栈过密感。
findings.fix: 把 1-2 门语言放成主语言，其余语言只在具体集成/辅助 bullet 里点到为止，避免给人“全栈式日常主用”的感觉。

revision_priority: [MUST] 把 Summary 第一条改成角色方向先行，去掉“transitioning from analytics”的首屏弱化感。
[MUST] 收敛 TikTok 实习段的语言堆叠感，明确 1-2 门主语言，其余语言降级为辅助集成上下文。
[MUST] 取消正文里 `team-maintained` / `team-owned` / `intern-owned` 这类限定语的加粗。
[SHOULD] 继续保留 LLM customization / RAG / evaluation 的桥接，但让它更贴近实际训练或评测贡献。
